slides.subtitle: And most people haven't noticed yet

tweets.text:
The virtual try-on market just hit $6.4 billion.

By 2030: $15.8 billion.

Fashion is no longer about what's on the rack. It's about what you can see on YOU — instantly.

Online shoppers return 1 in 3 items because they couldn't tell how it would look.

Virtual try-on cuts that return rate by up to 64%.

That's not a feature. That's a fundamental shift in how fashion works.

AI isn't just suggesting outfits.

It's replacing the fitting room. The personal stylist. The long walk back to the rack.

Gen Z already expects this. Everyone else is catching up.

This is exactly why we built Slidez.

One photo. Real outfits from real brands. Buy what you know looks good.

No guessing. No returns.

The brands that adapt to AI styling will win this decade.

So will the people who dress smarter.

Follow @slidez — we track this so you don't have to.
